description: Map an agent task or natural-language prompt into a capability-backed case family, required evidence streams, and explicit repairable execution plan.
physical_assumptions: The prompt is intent, not an executable simulation.
The selected capability should describe reusable physical invariants rather than a scene template.
Every planned object should have a stable id, role, and evidence requirement before runtime.
verifier_rules: Primary capability is not a deprecated compatibility alias.
Planning output includes pipeline stages, physics constraints, asset operations, and verification layers.
Unsupported prompts fall back to explicit physics control rather than a visual-only plan.
repair_suggestions: Add prompt terms or a capability rule for the missing physical invariant.
Create a parameterized case template instead of a one-off prompt template.
Attach required signals and verifier rules before adding runtime code.
